goal_text:
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'cambridge' and should 'arrive by 11:30'.
The train should depart from 'ely' and should leave on 'sunday'.
Make sure you get 'travel time', 'departure time', and 'train ID'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for a train. The train should go to cambridge and should arrive by 11:30
The train should depart from ely and should leave on sunday
Make sure you get travel time, departure time, and train ID
